replies.msg:

目前仍欠大約26000個簽署，香港人希望取回原有手上選票的請支持！
https://twitter.com/ElmerYuen/status/1299329078688968704

https://petitions.whitehouse.gov/petition/support-hong-kong-restart-clean-2020-legislative-council-election-now

https://petitions.whitehouse.gov/petition/we-people-support-ban-wechat-and-tiktok
